---
description: A standalone /ucg-formalize <epic> readiness verdict. Use when an operator runs /ucg-formalize.
---

# UCG Formalize (name-deleted mutant)

This SKILL.md mutant has the `name:` frontmatter line DELETED. The validate-skills
SKILL-02 rule must fire HIGH+ (CRITICAL) on the missing `name` field, so a `--strict`
run over a directory carrying this content as SKILL.md exits 1. This is the
anti-vacuous twin input: it proves the validator is actually reading the new skill
dir and not silently skipping an unknown path.
